description: Remove dead code and orphaned files: App.legacy.vue (2142 lines, never imported), unused nullSafe.ts utilities (defined in both admin and portal but never imported in any Vue component), and the orphaned useDebounceAndOptimizations.test.ts (tests an inline debounce function that has no corresponding source file in shared/composables).
steps: Delete panel/web/admin/src/App.legacy.vue - it is a 2142-line monolithic SFC that was the old single-file app before the Vue Router refactor. It is never imported by any file (confirmed via grep). The current App.vue just renders <router-view />.

Delete panel/web/shared/composables/useDebounceAndOptimizations.test.ts - this test file defines and tests an inline debounce function within the test itself; there is no corresponding useDebounceAndOptimizations.ts source file in shared/composables. The test is self-contained and tests no actual production code. It validates 'Requirement 21.1/21.3' but does so with inlined implementations, not imported ones.

Delete panel/web/admin/src/utils/nullSafe.ts and panel/web/admin/src/utils/nullSafe.test.ts - the displayValue() and formatDate() functions are never imported by any Vue component or store in the admin app. The admin views use their own inline formatDate or the one from App.legacy.vue (now deleted). The test only tests the file itself.

Delete panel/web/portal/src/utils/nullSafe.ts - same situation as admin. The portal views (BillingView, SupportView, TicketThread) each define their own inline formatDate functions rather than importing from this utility file. The file is never imported anywhere.
acceptance_criteria: App.legacy.vue no longer exists in the repository
useDebounceAndOptimizations.test.ts no longer exists in shared/composables/
nullSafe.ts and nullSafe.test.ts no longer exist in admin/src/utils/
nullSafe.ts no longer exists in portal/src/utils/
No remaining imports reference any of the deleted files (grep confirmation)
The admin and portal apps still build and type-check without errors (vue-tsc --noEmit passes)
verification: Run: grep -r 'App.legacy' panel/web/ to confirm no references
Run: grep -r 'useDebounceAndOptimizations' panel/web/ to confirm no references
Run: grep -r 'nullSafe' panel/web/ to confirm no references
Run: cd panel/web/admin && npx vue-tsc --noEmit (if node_modules available) OR verify no import references remain via grep
Run: cd panel/web/shared && npx vitest run to confirm remaining shared tests still pass
findings: All 5 files deleted successfully. Grep confirms no remaining imports reference any deleted file. The admin/src/utils/ and portal/src/utils/ directories were also removed as they became empty after the deletions. No node_modules installed so build/type-check verification was not possible, but grep-based verification confirms no dangling references.
